oci_identity_compartment.environment.rationale: IAM compartment has no direct metered runtime charge.

oci_core_vcn.main.rationale: One VCN remains within the documented Free Tier VCN allowance.

oci_core_internet_gateway.main.rationale: Internet Gateway creation has no direct hourly charge; outbound transfer remains usage-metered separately.

oci_core_service_gateway.object_storage.rationale: Service Gateway provides private access to Oracle Services without a paid NAT appliance.

oci_core_route_table.edge.rationale: VCN route-table primitive has no direct metered runtime charge.

oci_core_security_list.empty_baseline.rationale: Empty security list is a no-cost fail-closed subnet baseline.

oci_core_subnet.edge.rationale: Subnet primitive has no direct metered runtime charge.

oci_core_network_security_group.host.rationale: NSG is the primary no-cost network security boundary.

oci_core_network_security_group_security.rationale: Embedded NSG edge rules have no standalone metered charge.
Allowlisted SSH rule has no charge and is disabled by default for security.
ICMP path-MTU rule has no standalone charge.
Embedded bounded egress rule has no standalone charge.
Embedded DNS egress rule has no standalone charge.
Embedded DNS fallback rule has no standalone charge.
Embedded NTP egress rule has no standalone charge.
Embedded Service Gateway egress rule has no standalone charge.

oci_objectstorage_bucket.backups.rationale: Private bucket is free-safe only while aggregate Object Storage usage remains within the documented Always Free allowance; retention and usage alerts are consumer obligations.

oci_core_volume.data.rationale: 100 GB data volume plus 50 GB boot volume remains inside the 200 GB combined storage envelope.

oci_core_instance.host.rationale: Mandated 4 OCPU/24 GB profile is not verified by current Oracle Always Free documentation and requires explicit owner acknowledgement.

oci_core_volume_attachment.data.rationale: Paravirtualized attachment has no separate metered charge from the classified volume.

oci_identity_dynamic_group.host.rationale: Dynamic group has no direct metered runtime charge.

oci_identity_policy.host.rationale: IAM policy has no direct metered runtime charge.
